shipment.deliveredDesc: This shipment has been successfully arrived. In accordance with our privacy policy, personal details have been anonymized.
shipment.outForDeliveryDesc: Our local agent is en route to your destination.
shipment.canceledDesc: This shipment has been canceled by the administrator. Please contact support for more details.

admin.title: Create New Shipment
admin.successDesc: Please send this Tracking ID to the customer.
admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this shipment?
admin.confirmBulkDelete: Delete all arrived shipments? This cannot be undone.

privacy_page.introDesc: At {{PLATFORM_NAME}}, we take your data privacy with the utmost seriousness. This policy outlines how we handle tracking data and the strict measures we take to protect Personal Identifiable Information (PII).
privacy_page.dataDesc: Our system is built on a "Privacy First" architecture. Once a shipment is marked as **Arrived**, our automated data retention policy triggers a comprehensive scrubbing of all PII, including:
privacy_page.dataFinal: This anonymized data is retained only for logistical auditing purposes without any link back to the individuals involved.
privacy_page.securityDesc: We use industry-standard encryption (AES-256) for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for all data in transit. Access to our administrative portals is strictly controlled via secure authentication gateways.

terms_page.agreeDesc: By using the {{PLATFORM_NAME}} tracking platform, you agree to these professional terms of service. Our service is provided as-is for the purpose of shipment visibility and transparency.
terms_page.useDesc: Users are prohibited from attempting to reverse-engineer the tracking ID generation logic or bypass administrative security gates. Unauthorized access to delivery data is a violation of international logistics standards.
terms_page.limitDesc: While we strive for 100% telemetry accuracy, {{PLATFORM_NAME}} is not liable for delayed status updates caused by upstream courier disruptions or network latency.

about.title: Premium Logistics Tracking
about.subtitle: Secure, Real-Time Visibility Across the Global Supply Chain.
about.description: {{PLATFORM_NAME}} provides enterprise-grade tracking solutions for high-stakes shipments. Our platform ensures that every package is monitored with precision, offering unparalleled transparency and privacy for both senders and recipients.
about.missionDesc: To redefine the tracking experience through intuitive design and uncompromising data security.
about.transparencyDesc: We believe in zero-latency communication. Every status update is verified and synchronized across our global network within seconds.
about.ctaDesc: Join thousands of enterprises trusting {{PLATFORM_NAME}} for their high-stakes supply chain visibility.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about your shipment? We're here to help.
